2026-04-22T08:07:41.5797391Z hint: 	git config --global init.defaultBranch <name>

2026-04-22T08:07:41.5798136Z hint: Names commonly chosen instead of 'master' are 'main', 'trunk' and
2026-04-22T08:07:41.5798771Z hint: 'development'. The just-created branch can be renamed via this command:
2026-04-22T08:07:41.5799243Z hint:
2026-04-22T08:07:41.5799469Z hint: 	git branch -m <name>

2026-04-22T08:08:08.4987321Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-04-22T08:08:08.4987548Z [36;1m  echo "run_detection=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-04-22T08:08:08.4987948Z [36;1m  echo "Detection skipped: no agent outputs or patches to analyze"[0m
2026-04-22T08:08:08.4988301Z [36;1mfi[0m
